case_title: CHAN, ALLAN et al vs. MEDINA, MYRIAM AMELUCY et al

docket_entries.description: AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $80.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, ALLAN LEE, BECKY AS TO DEFENDANT MEDINA, MYRIAM AMELUCY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, ALLAN LEE, BECKY SERVED MAR-16-1993, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MEDINA, MYRIAM AMELUCY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, ALLAN LEE, BECKY AS TO DEFENDANT MEDINA, MYRIAM AMELUCY DOES I-X SUMMONS ISSUED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, ALLAN LEE, BECKY AS TO DEFENDANT MEDINA, MYRIAM AMELUCY
DECLARATION OF ALLAN CHAN RE: AMENDED MONEY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, ALLAN LEE, BECKY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, ALLAN LEE, BECKY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEDINA, MYRIAM AMELUCY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 97 HOLLOWAY ST. S.F. CA 94112, LEASE FORFEITED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, ALLAN LEE, BECKY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEDINA, MYRIAM AMELUCY $1,770.60 RENT, $450.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,300.60
